glosses.vi: sự dư thừa; sự quá mức

sentences.target: J'ai une amende pour excès de vitesse.
sentences.reading: /ʒe yn amɑ̃d puʁ ɛk.sɛ də vitɛs/

translations.fr: J'ai une amende pour excès de vitesse.
translations.ipa: /ʒe yn amɑ̃d puʁ ɛk.sɛ də vitɛs/
translations.es: Me multaron por exceso de velocidad.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Strafzettel wegen Geschwindigkeitsüberschreitung bekommen.
translations.it: Ho preso una multa per eccesso di velocità.
translations.pt: Levei uma multa por excesso de velocidade.
translations.tr: Hız sınırını aştığım için ceza aldım.
translations.vi: Tôi bị phạt vì chạy quá tốc độ.
translations.nl: Ik heb een boete gekregen voor te hard rijden.
translations.hi: मुझे तेज गति से गाड़ी चलाने पर चालान मिला.
translations.id: Saya kena tilang karena melebihi batas kecepatan.
translations.ro: Am primit amendă pentru depășirea vitezei.
translations.cs: Dostal jsem pokutu za překročení rychlosti.
translations.ja: スピード違反で切符を切られました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular ('I have').
Indefinite article, feminine singular, agrees with 'amende'.
Common noun, direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing the cause/purpose phrase ('for speeding').
Common noun; head of the prepositional complement 'pour excès de vitesse'.
Preposition linking 'excès' to its complement 'vitesse' ('excess of').
Common noun; complement of 'de' in the fixed expression 'excès de vitesse'.

sentences.target: Évite l'excès de sucre le soir.

translations.fr: Évite l'excès de sucre le soir.
translations.en: Avoid excess sugar in the evening.
translations.es: Evita el exceso de azúcar por la noche.
translations.it: Evita l'eccesso di zucchero la sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 晚上避免摄入过多糖分。
translations.pt: Evite consumir muito açúcar à noite.
translations.vi: Tránh tiêu thụ quá nhiều đường vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: تجنب الإفراط في تناول السكر مساءً.
translations.hu: Este kerüld a túl sok cukrot.
translations.hi: शाम को चीनी का अधिक सेवन न करें.
translations.el: Απέφυγε την υπερβολική ζάχαρη το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Unngå for mye sukker om kvelden.
translations.id: Hindari konsumsi gula berlebihan di malam hari.
translations.sv: Undvik för mycket socker på kvällen.
translations.cs: Večer se vyhýbej přílišnému množství cukru.
translations.da: Undgå for meget sukker om aftenen.
translations.ja: 夜は砂糖の摂り過ぎを避けてください。

tokens.explanation: Verb in the 2nd person singular imperative ('Avoid').
Definite article, masculine singular, elided before vowel-initial noun.
Direct object of 'Évite'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement ('excess of sugar').
Common noun; complement of 'de'.
Definite article, masculine singular, in the time expression 'le soir'.
Common noun; adverbial time complement ('in the evening').

sentences.target: Ne fais pas d'excès ce week-end.
sentences.reading: /nə fɛ pa d ɛk.sɛ sə wikɛnd/

translations.fr: Ne fais pas d'excès ce week-end.
translations.ipa: /nə fɛ pa d ɛk.sɛ sə wikɛnd/
translations.es: No te excedas este fin de semana.
translations.pt: Não exagere neste fim de semana.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này đừng quá đà.
translations.ar: لا تبالغ في نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.hu: Ne vidd túlzásba ezen a hétvégén.
translations.el: Μην το παρακάνεις αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.ja: 今週末はやり過ぎないでください。

tokens.explanation: First part of discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas' with imperative.
Verb, 2nd person singular imperative ('do/make').
Negative adverb completing 'ne ... pas'.
Elided 'de' used after negation before vowel-initial noun (partitive-like).
Common noun; object of 'fais' within the negative imperative.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'week-end' ('this weekend').
Common noun; temporal complement.

sentences.target: Nous évitons l'excès d'alcool à table.
sentences.reading: /nu e.vi.tɔ̃ lɛk.sɛ d alkɔl a tabl/

translations.fr: Nous évitons l'excès d'alcool à table.
translations.ipa: /nu e.vi.tɔ̃ lɛk.sɛ d alkɔl a tabl/
translations.en: We avoid excess alcohol at the table.
translations.es: Evitamos el exceso de alcohol en la mesa.
translations.de: Wir vermeiden übermäßigen Alkoholkonsum am Tisch.
translations.it: Evitiamo l'eccesso di alcol a tavola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在餐桌上避免饮酒过量。
translations.yue: 我哋喺餐桌上避免飲酒過量。
translations.ru: Мы за столом избегаем чрезмерного употребления алкоголя.
translations.pt: Evitamos o excesso de álcool à mesa.
translations.he: אנחנו נמנעים משתייה מופרזת של אלכוהול בשעת הארוחה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh uống quá nhiều rượu khi ngồi ăn.
translations.ar: نحن نتجنب الإفراط في شرب الكحول على المائدة.
translations.nl: Wij vermijden overmatig alcoholgebruik aan tafel.
translations.uk: Ми за столом уникаємо надмірного вживання алкоголю.
translations.hu: Az asztalnál kerüljük a túlzott alkoholfogyasztást.
translations.hi: हम खाने की मेज़ पर शराब का ज़्यादा सेवन नहीं करते.
translations.pl: Unikamy nadmiernego spożycia alkoholu przy stole.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε την υπερβολική κατανάλωση αλκοόλ στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Vi unngår for mye alkohol ved bordet.
translations.id: Kami menghindari konsumsi alkohol berlebihan di meja makan.
translations.sv: Vi undviker för mycket alkohol vid bordet.
translations.ro: Evităm excesul de alcool la masă.
translations.cs: U stolu se vyhýbáme nadměrné konzumaci alkoholu.
translations.da: Vi undgår for meget alkohol ved bordet.
translations.ja: 食卓ではアルコールの飲み過ぎを避けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Verb, present indicative 1st person plural ('we avoid').
Definite article, masculine singular, elided before vowel-initial noun.
Direct object of 'évitons'.
Elided 'de' before vowel-initial noun ('d'alcool').
Common noun; complement of 'de'.
Preposition introducing a locative/situational complement.
Common noun; complement of 'à' ('at the table/while dining').
